title: Kustomize, Helm 4, Rendering, Validation, Field Ownership, and Promotion · Spiral Platform Review
summary: An on-call handoff reconstructs kustomize, helm 4, rendering, validation, field ownership, and promotion from delayed object status, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the rendered environment release package under changed capacity. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for rendered environment release package after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compose Kustomize resources, components, overlays, prefixes, namespaces, labels, images, replacements, and patches without corrupting selectors or source bases.
Generate ConfigMaps and Secrets from external sources, reason about name hashes and references, restrict loading, and keep secret values out of rendered evidence.
Inspect Helm 4 charts, templates, values schema, dependencies, hooks, release state, OCI identity, install, upgrade, rollback, uninstall, and ownership boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# kubernetes-basics cumulative orchestration portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never invoke kubectl, read kubeconfig, contact a cluster API, or execute host commands.
workspace: kubernetes
version-baseline:
  kubernetes: 1.36.2
  minikube: 1.38.1
  gateway-api: 1.5.1
  helm: 4.2.2
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-cluster
evidence:

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence · Review K8s Gitops Field Ownership Promotion
steps.instruction:
review case — A review environment overlay drifts from base, Helm values change immutable fields, rendered resources contain a secret, and promotion rebuilds a new image. Render, diff, validate, pin, sign, promote the same artifact, and retain rollback evidence. Competency probe: Design pull-based reconciliation, field ownership, drift policy, secret authority, immutable promotion, health gates, rollback, and break-glass recovery without vendor coupling.

Inspect the K8s Gitops Field Ownership Promotion trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
